} p.keyPressed = function() { // Log input p.logs.inputs.push({ input_type: "keyPressed", data: { key: p.key, keyCode: p.keyCode }, framecount: p.frameCount, timestamp: Date.now() }); // Game phase controls if (p.keyCode === 13) { // ENTER if (gameState.gamePhase === GAME_PHASES.START) { setGamePhase(GAME_PHASES.PLAYING); } } else if (p.keyCode === 82) { // R if (gameState.gamePhase === GAME_PHASES.GAME_OVER_WIN || gameState.gamePhase === GAME_PHASES.GAME_OVER_LOSE) { initGame(); setGamePhase(GAME_PHASES.START); } } // Gameplay controls (only in PLAYING phase) if (gameState.gamePhase === GAME_PHASES.PLAYING && gameState.controlMode === "HUMAN") { if (p.keyCode >= 49 && p.keyCode <= 52) { // 1-4 keys gameState.selectedTowerType = p.keyCode - 48; Kingdom Defense

Defend your kingdom from relentless waves of enemies! Strategically place towers along the path to stop invaders from reaching your base. You start with 20 lives and must survive all waves to win. Earn gold by defeating enemies to build and upgrade towers. Choose from Archer, Mage, Barracks, and Druid towers, each with unique abilities. Upgrade towers to unlock powerful specializations. Deploy your hero strategically and use special abilities to turn the tide of battle. Earn stars based on performance to unlock global upgrades between levels.

Arrow Keys: Move hero | Space: Place tower | Shift: Upgrade selected tower | Z: Use hero special ability | 1-4: Select tower type | Enter: Start game | ESC: Pause/Unpause | R: Restart
